script.code: var risk = ($workflow.input.risk_score || ''); var conf = ($workflow.input.classification_confidence || ''); var fraudScore = ($workflow.input.fraud_score || 0); var fraudRec = ($workflow.input.fraud_recommendation || 'proceed'); var dup = !!$workflow.input.duplicate_detected; var split = !!$workflow.input.split_claim_detected; var routing = ($workflow.input.policy_routing || 'manager_review'); var recommendation, rationale; if (routing === 'reject' || dup) { var why = []; if (dup) { why.push('a confirmed duplicate (double-payment risk)'); } if (routing === 'reject') { why.push('a hard policy violation or over the category spend limit'); } recommendation = 'REJECT'; rationale = 'Blocked by ' + why.join(' and ') + '.'; } else if (fraudRec === 'reject') { recommendation = 'REJECT'; rationale = 'Fraud Sentinel scored this ' + fraudScore + '/100 (High) - too risky to pay.'; } else if (split || fraudRec === 'review') { recommendation = 'HITL_REVIEW'; rationale = 'Fraud signals warrant a human reviewer before any payout.'; } else if (conf === 'Low' || routing === 'manager_review') { var reason = (conf === 'Low') ? 'low classification confidence' : 'policy requires manager review'; recommendation = 'HITL_REVIEW'; rationale = 'Escalating to a human because of ' + reason + '.'; } else if (routing === 'auto_approve') { recommendation = 'AUTO_APPROVE'; rationale = 'Clean on all three fronts and under the auto-approve threshold - straight through to payout.'; } else { recommendation = 'PROCEED'; rationale = 'No violations or fraud signals; proceeds to payout after a light review.'; } return { recommendation: recommendation, rationale: rationale, audit_entry: { timestamp: new Date().toISOString(), stage: 'consensus_arbitration', stage_number: 5, actor: 'ConsensusArbitrationWorkflow', actor_type: 'api_workflow', action: 'arbitrated', details: recommendation + ': ' + rationale } };

metadata.displayName: Arbitrate three verdicts into one recommendation (documented precedence)
